144 D0500D1_STF_LTL_ENRGY_CD D0500D1_STF_LTL_ENRGY_CD D0500D1 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Little Energy Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment whether the resident is feeling tired or having little energy. -=Not assessed/no
